seoTitle: Tomago vs Tomakin — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tomago and Tomakin. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tomago and Tomakin.
heading: Tomago vs Tomakin — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tomago, New South Wales and Tomakin, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tomakin has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Tomago (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tomago or Tomakin safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tomago has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Tomakin scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tomago scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Tomakin scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tomago or Tomakin?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tomakin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
